revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-3-275

The time elapsing between the commencement of the supply of power to the lamp and the attainment of a specified percentage of the nominal luminous intensity or luminous flux of the lamp at the given power level.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Incandescence Time (of a lamp)}}
